state.next-action:
Phase 38 shipped (2026-04-12): skill candidates auto-drafted from high-pressure phases.
=== SHIPPED === - compute-self-eval.mjs now auto-drafts SKILL.md candidates for every high-pressure phase - 12 candidates landed in .agents/skills/candidates/ (phase-10, 12, 13, 14, 14.5, 17, 18, 20, 21, 22, 30, 34) - Candidates have status: candidate, category: System, origin: auto-drafted in frontmatter - build-site-data.mjs catalog scanner now excludes candidates/ directory (quarantined from live catalog) - PlanningSkillCandidatesTab component with info icon HoverCard explaining the feedback loop - New "Skill candidates" tab on /planning page showing draft metadata, source phase, and task list expansion
=== DECISIONS === GAD-D-144: Skill candidates quarantine and review workflow
=== NEXT === 1. Execute phase 35 (runtime identity) — unblocks phase 36 runtime.primary consumption 2. Execute phase 36 (per-eval repos + command split) 3. Phase 37 (gad project) queued, depends on 36 4. Manually review 12 candidates on the site and decide: promote, merge, or discard
=== SELF-EVAL (latest) === 3,468 events | 191 tasks (185 done) | 141 decisions Framework overhead: 23.5% | Loop compliance: 80% Skill candidates: 12
